author: y4rr
content: Decision: Loader dispatches via named_modules + as_any (the pre-flight's recommended generic mechanism). When a BN path isn't reachable in named_modules() (i.e. the parent model doesn't override Module::named_children), the loader emits a hard FerrotorchError::InvalidArgument naming the gap — no silent skip, no cascade_skip-shaped smoothing. This is consistent with the project's 'failure modes surface, not smooth' bind. The current ferrotorch-vision models (ResNet50 etc.) do NOT override named_children, so resnet50_value_parity will FAIL after this change. The boundary 'NO changes to ferrotorch-vision/src/' blocks the obvious fix (add named_children to ResNet50). Reporting REDIRECT-NEEDED to architect; filing a follow-up issue covering the architectural-completion gap.
